text:
ありがとう！
透き通っていてすごくきれい……

食材で使うにはやっぱり厳しそうだけど
グラスなんかの食器として加工すれば
ぴったりだと思うわ。

さっそくこれを加工してもらうわね！
どうもありがとう
<

Excellent! Thank you! Wow, just look at these.
So translucent, so beautiful...

I guess they'd be a little too tough to use as
ingredients after all... but they'd be perfect
for making into glasses and other dishes!

I'll get to work on some right away.
Thank you, <%me>!
